name: Monopolka
detailed_description:
Description

Standard Monopoly Game.
You need to become a market monopoly and have monetary superiority over other players.
You can choose a "Furry" characters of available and choose color. Сan improve your business to get more profit from them. Trade with other players to get more benefits.
Main goal of the game - to remain the only player able to pay for visits to foreign companies. If you can not pay - you lose and waiting for the next round.

Features

  • 12 characters to choose from

  • Throw dice as you like

  • Simple interface
  • 15 musical compositions:
    Koker 007 - Breath of Spring
    Koker 007 - Deep memory
    Koker 007 - Ektos
    Koker 007 - Farewell Forever
    Koker 007 - Highlight
    Koker 007 - Hyperspace jump through the event horizon
    Koker 007 - Pollen'o FF
    Koker 007 - Scatter Blue
    Koker 007 - Broken sight
    Koker 007 - Gliese 581
    Koker 007 - Relaying
    Koker 007 - Sea smooth
    Koker 007 - 2012.01.16 v1.5
    Koker 007 - 2012.09.08 v0.6
    Koker 007 - 2013.02.08 v09
  • Can up to 10 players playing at one time
  • Selection player color on slider
  • Сonnection to the server from the list of steam friends or by ip
  • 9 easy Steam Achievements

Note: This is a multiplayer game, to start the game, need at least 2 players. The maximum can be 10.
At the moment, you can connect to the server only by ip. Server must take care that port 1590 is opened.
